author: YourName
install_msg:
InactivePurge loaded!
Use [p]inactive to list & purge inactive members (full or selective).
name: InactivePurge
short: Paginated list & purge of members with 0 messages
description: Shows inactive members (0 tracked messages). Supports full purge or selective kick via multi-select menu across pages. Modern UI with buttons & select menus, safe rate limits.
end_user_data_statement: Stores only per-member message count (integer). No content stored. Data cleared on kick/leave.
